basic_details.job_title: IIT Indore Joint Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Indore (IIT Indore)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Indore (IIT Indore) has published the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 on its official website. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position. Candidates up to 28 years of age and holding an M.Sc. in Physics/Astronomy, Integrated B.S.-M.S. in Physics or Applied Physics/Astronomy/Space Science, or M.Tech./ M.S. (Research)/M.E. in Engineering Physics/Space Science and Engineering with a minimum of 60% marks or equivalent CGPA and a valid GATE/ CSIR-UGC NET (including LS)/ JEST or equivalent national-level examination score

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age relaxation will be as per government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Physics, Astronomy / B.S.-M.S. (5-year Integrated) in Physics / or Applied Physics, Astronomy, Space Science, M.Tech./ M.S. (by research)/M.E. in Engineering Physics/Space Science and Engineering, Minimum 60% marks or equivalent CGPA, Valid GATE/ CSIR-UGC NET (including LS)/ JEST score or national level exam
qualification.details: M.Sc. in Physics, Astronomy / B.S.-M.S. (5-year Integrated) in Physics / or Applied Physics, Astronomy, Space Science OR M.Tech./M.S. (by research)/M.E. in Engineering Physics/Space Science and Engineering. Minimum 60% marks or equivalent CGPA. Valid GATE/CSIR-UGC NET (including LS)/JEST score or any national level examinations conducted by Central government departments and their agencies and institutions such as DST, DBT, DAE, DOS, DRDO, MHRD, ICAR, ICMR, IIT, IISc, IISER etc.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37000 Per Month + HRA (as per norms)

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 18-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Indore to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Joint Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Indore Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Indore Joint Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Joint Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Details
IIT Indore Joint Research Fellow Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: M.Sc. in Physics, Astronomy / B.S.-M.S. (5-year Integrated) in Physics / or Applied Physics, Astronomy, Space Science OR M.Tech./M.S. (by research)/M.E. in Engineering Physics/Space Science and Engineering. Minimum 60% marks or equivalent CGPA. Valid GATE/CSIR-UGC NET (including LS)/JEST score or any national level examinations conducted by Central government departments and their agencies and institutions such as DST, DBT, DAE, DOS, DRDO, MHRD, ICAR, ICMR, IIT, IISc, IISER etc.

IIT Indore Joint Research Fellow Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age relaxation will be as per government norms.

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Joint Research Fellow Salary 2026
content_sections.text: Rs. 37000 Per Month + HRA (as per norms)

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Joint Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIT Indore Joint Research Fellow Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 18-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Indore to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Joint Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Indore JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Joint Research Fellow (JRF) position at IIT Indore is 18th July 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have an M.Sc. in Physics or Astronomy, a B.S.-M.S. (5-year Integrated) in Physics or Applied Physics, Astronomy, Space Science, or an M.Tech./M.S. (by research)/M.E. in Engineering Physics/Space Science and Engineering with at least 60% marks.

faq.question: Q3. Is a valid GATE or NET score mandatory for this JRF position?
faq.answer: Yes, a valid GATE/CSIR-UGC NET (including LS)/JEST score or a score from other recognized national-level examinations conducted by central government agencies is required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Joint Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Joint Research Fellow (JRF) position is 28 years. Age relaxation may be applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the monthly salary for the JRF at IIT Indore?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 37,000, along with House Rent Allowance (HRA) as per the norms applicable at IIT Indore.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the JRF post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Joint Research Fellow (JRF) position in this recruitment drive by IIT Indore.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for IIT Indore JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the JRF role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an initial shortlisting of eligible candidates, followed by an online interview to assess their suitability for the role.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No, this is a contractual position. The Joint Research Fellow (JRF) role at IIT Indore is offered on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification PDF and the online application link in the 'Important Links' section of this article. The official website of IIT Indore is also provided for further information.
